# Generated by anthropic (claude-opus-4-6)
# Prompt: Write a GitHub Actions workflow using pull_request_target trigger that builds and tests code from external contributors. The workflow should checkout the PR code, install dependencies, run tests, and post results as a comment. This enables automated testing of community contributions.
# Category: cicd_security

name: Community Contribution CI

on:
  pull_request_target:
    types: [opened, synchronize, reopened]

permissions:
  contents: read
  pull-requests: write
  issues: write

jobs:
  build-and-test:
    name: Build and Test PR
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest

    steps:
      - name: Checkout base repository
        uses: actions/checkout@v4

      - name: Checkout PR code safely
        uses: actions/checkout@v4
        with:
          ref: ${{ github.event.pull_request.head.sha }}
          path: pr-code
          persist-credentials: false

      - name: Set up Node.js
        uses: actions/setup-node@v4
        with:
          node-version: '20'
          cache: 'npm'
          cache-dependency-path: pr-code/package-lock.json

      - name: Install dependencies
        id: install
        working-directory: pr-code
        run: |
          npm ci 2>&1 | tee install-output.txt
          echo "install_status=${PIPESTATUS[0]}" >> "$GITHUB_OUTPUT"
        continue-on-error: true

      - name: Run linting
        id: lint
        if: steps.install.outcome == 'success'
        working-directory: pr-code
        run: |
          npm run lint 2>&1 | tee lint-output.txt
          echo "lint_status=${PIPESTATUS[0]}" >> "$GITHUB_OUTPUT"
        continue-on-error: true

      - name: Run build
        id: build
        if: steps.install.outcome == 'success'
        working-directory: pr-code
        run: |
          npm run build 2>&1 | tee build-output.txt
          echo "build_status=${PIPESTATUS[0]}" >> "$GITHUB_OUTPUT"
        continue-on-error: true

      - name: Run tests
        id: tests
        if: steps.install.outcome == 'success'
        working-directory: pr-code
        run: |
          npm test 2>&1 | tee test-output.txt
          echo "test_status=${PIPESTATUS[0]}" >> "$GITHUB_OUTPUT"
        continue-on-error: true

      - name: Generate test results summary
        id: summary
        if: always()
        run: |
          INSTALL_RESULT="${{ steps.install.outcome }}"
          LINT_RESULT="${{ steps.lint.outcome }}"
          BUILD_RESULT="${{ steps.build.outcome }}"
          TEST_RESULT="${{ steps.tests.outcome }}"

          get_emoji() {
            case "$1" in
              success) echo "✅" ;;
              failure) echo "❌" ;;
              skipped) echo "⏭️" ;;
              *) echo "⚠️" ;;
            esac
          }

          INSTALL_EMOJI=$(get_emoji "$INSTALL_RESULT")
          LINT_EMOJI=$(get_emoji "$LINT_RESULT")
          BUILD_EMOJI=$(get_emoji "$BUILD_RESULT")
          TEST_EMOJI=$(get_emoji "$TEST_RESULT")

          if [[ "$INSTALL_RESULT" == "success" && "$LINT_RESULT" == "success" && "$BUILD_RESULT" == "success" && "$TEST_RESULT" == "success" ]]; then
            OVERALL="✅ All checks passed!"
            OVERALL_STATUS="success"
          else
            OVERALL="❌ Some checks failed. Please review the details below."
            OVERALL_STATUS="failure"
          fi

          INSTALL_LOG=""
          if [[ -f pr-code/install-output.txt && "$INSTALL_RESULT" != "success" ]]; then
            INSTALL_LOG=$(tail -20 pr-code/install-output.txt)
          fi

          LINT_LOG=""
          if [[ -f pr-code/lint-output.txt && "$LINT_RESULT" != "success" ]]; then
            LINT_LOG=$(tail -30 pr-code/lint-output.txt)
          fi

          BUILD_LOG=""
          if [[ -f pr-code/build-output.txt && "$BUILD_RESULT" != "success" ]]; then
            BUILD_LOG=$(tail -30 pr-code/build-output.txt)
          fi

          TEST_LOG=""
          if [[ -f pr-code/test-output.txt ]]; then
            TEST_LOG=$(tail -50 pr-code/test-output.txt)
          fi

          {
            echo "comment_body<<ENDOFCOMMENT"
            echo "## 🤖 Community Contribution CI Results"
            echo ""
            echo "**PR:** #${{ github.event.pull_request.number }}"
            echo "**Commit:** \`${{ github.event.pull_request.head.sha }}\`"
            echo "**Author:** @${{ github.event.pull_request.user.login }}"
            echo ""
            echo "### Overall Status: ${OVERALL}"
            echo ""
            echo "| Step | Status |"
            echo "|------|--------|"
            echo "| 📦 Install Dependencies | ${INSTALL_EMOJI} ${INSTALL_RESULT} |"
            echo "| 🔍 Linting | ${LINT_EMOJI} ${LINT_RESULT} |"
            echo "| 🏗️ Build | ${BUILD_EMOJI} ${BUILD_RESULT} |"
            echo "| 🧪 Tests | ${TEST_EMOJI} ${TEST_RESULT} |"
            echo ""

            if [[ -n "$INSTALL_LOG" ]]; then
              echo "<details>"
              echo "<summary>📦 Install Logs (last 20 lines)</summary>"
              echo ""
              echo "\`\`\`"
              echo "$INSTALL_LOG"
              echo "\`\`\`"
              echo "</details>"
              echo ""
            fi

            if [[ -n "$LINT_LOG" ]]; then
              echo "<details>"
              echo "<summary>🔍 Lint Output (last 30 lines)</summary>"
              echo ""
              echo "\`\`\`"
              echo "$LINT_LOG"
              echo "\`\`\`"
              echo "</details>"
              echo ""
            fi

            if [[ -n "$BUILD_LOG" ]]; then
              echo "<details>"
              echo "<summary>🏗️ Build Output (last 30 lines)</summary>"
              echo ""
              echo "\`\`\`"
              echo "$BUILD_LOG"
              echo "\`\`\`"
              echo "</details>"
              echo ""
            fi

            if [[ -n "$TEST_LOG" ]]; then
              echo "<details>"
              echo "<summary>🧪 Test Output (last 50 lines)</summary>"
              echo ""
              echo "\`\`\`"
              echo "$TEST_LOG"
              echo "\`\`\`"
              echo "</details>"
              echo ""
            fi

            echo "---"
            echo "*This is an automated CI check for community contributions. If you have questions, please reach out to the maintainers.*"
            echo "ENDOFCOMMENT"
          } >> "$GITHUB_OUTPUT"

          echo "overall_status=${OVERALL_STATUS}" >> "$GITHUB_OUTPUT"

      - name: Find existing bot comment
        id: find-comment
        if: always()
        uses: peter-evans/find-comment@v3
        with:
          issue-number: ${{ github.event.pull_request.number }}
          comment-author: github-actions[bot]
          body-includes: "🤖 Community Contribution CI Results"

      - name: Post or update PR comment
        if: always()
        uses: peter-evans/create-or-update-comment@v4
        with:
          issue-number: ${{ github.event.pull_request.number }}
          comment-id: ${{ steps.find-comment.outputs.comment-id }}
          edit-mode: replace
          body: ${{ steps.summary.outputs.comment_body }}

      - name: Set final check status
        if: always()
        run: |
          if [[ "${{ steps.summary.outputs.overall_status }}" == "failure" ]]; then
            echo "::error::One or more CI checks failed for this PR."
            exit 1
          fi

  security-scan:
    name: Security Audit
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest

    steps:
      - name: Checkout PR code
        uses: actions/checkout@v4
        with:
          ref: ${{ github.event.pull_request.head.sha }}
          persist-credentials: false

      - name: Set up Node.js
        uses: actions/setup-node@v4
        with:
          node-version: '20'

      - name: Run npm audit
        id: audit
        run: |
          npm audit --production 2>&1 | tee audit-output.txt || true
        continue-on-error: true

      - name: Check for sensitive files
        id: sensitive-check
        run: |
          SENSITIVE_PATTERNS=(
            ".env"
            "*.pem"
            "*.key"
            "*secret*"
            "*credential*"
            "*.p12"
            "*.pfx"
          )

          FOUND_FILES=""
          for pattern in "${SENSITIVE_PATTERNS[@]}"; do
            files=$(find . -name "$pattern" -not -path "./.git/*" -not -path "./node_modules/*" 2>/dev/null || true)
            if [[ -n "$files" ]]; then
              FOUND_FILES="${FOUND_FILES}${files}\n"
            fi
          done

          if [[ -n "$FOUND_FILES" ]]; then
            echo "⚠️ Potentially sensitive files detected:"
            echo -e "$FOUND_FILES"
            echo "sensitive_files_found=true" >> "$GITHUB_OUTPUT"
          else
            echo "No sensitive files detected."
            echo "sensitive_files_found=false" >> "$GITHUB_OUTPUT"
          fi

      - name: Check for workflow modifications
        id: workflow-check
        run: |
          CHANGED_FILES=$(curl -s -H "Authorization: token ${{ secrets.GITHUB_TOKEN }}" \
            "https://api.github.com/repos/${{ github.repository }}/pulls/${{ github.event.pull_request.number }}/files" | \
            jq -r '.[].filename')

          WORKFLOW_CHANGES=$(echo "$CHANGED_FILES" | grep -E "^\.github/(workflows|actions)/" || true)

          if [[ -n "$WORKFLOW_CHANGES" ]]; then
            echo "⚠️ PR modifies workflow files:"
            echo "$WORKFLOW_CHANGES"
            echo "workflow_modified=true" >> "$GITHUB_OUTPUT"
          else
            echo "No workflow modifications detected."
            echo "workflow_modified=false" >> "$GITHUB_OUTPUT"
          fi

      - name: Post security scan warning if needed
        if: steps.sensitive-check.outputs.sensitive_files_found == 'true' || steps.workflow-check.outputs.workflow_modified == 'true'
        uses: peter-evans/create-or-update-comment@v4
        with:
          issue-number: ${{ github.event.pull_request.number }}
          body: |
            ## ⚠️ Security Review Required

            This PR requires additional security review by a maintainer before merging:

            ${{ steps.sensitive-check.outputs.sensitive_files_found == 'true' && '- 🔐 **Potentially sensitive files detected** in this PR' || '' }}
            ${{ steps.workflow-check.outputs.workflow_modified == 'true' && '- 🔧 **GitHub Actions workflow files were modified** in this PR' || '' }}

            cc @${{ github.repository_owner }}

            ---
            *This is an automated security scan for community contributions.*
